task_completion.description: Open the 'HeLa Cells' sample image in Fiji
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji application is open with an image window titled 'HeLa Cells' visible.

task_completion.description: Perform color deconvolution on the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Colour Deconvolution plugin dialog is visible, or multiple new image windows are generated from the original, typically with titles containing 'Colour_1', 'Colour_2', etc.

task_completion.description: Save the first resulting channel to channel_1.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in Fiji saving the Colour_1 image as 'channel_1.png' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists.

task_completion.description: Save the second resulting channel to channel_2.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in Fiji saving the Colour_2 image as 'channel_2.png' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists.

task_completion.description: Record measurement statistics for the first channel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji's 'Results' window is open, displaying calculated statistics (e.g., Area, Mean, Min, Max) specifically for the Colour_1 image.

task_completion.description: Save the measurement statistics to channel_1_stats.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving the Results table as 'channel_1_stats.csv' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing this file exists.

integrity.description: Agent used the Fiji GUI to perform the tasks rather than using terminal commands to create mock files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Fiji's menus (e.g., File > Open Samples, Image > Color > Colour Deconvolution, Analyze > Measure) and dialog boxes.

integrity.description: The saved channel images are actual separated components, not just renamed copies of the original image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The resulting Colour_1 and Colour_2 images look visually distinct from the original multi-color HeLa cells composite (e.g., they appear as grayscale or single-color intensity maps).

integrity.description: The statistics CSV is generated from actual Fiji measurements, not manually typed or mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Results' window in Fiji is populated with data before the CSV is saved, rather than the agent opening a text editor to manually create a CSV file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'HeLa Cells' sample is a built-in Fiji image (fluorescence, 48-bit RGB, 1.3M). It contains three 16-bit channels: red (lysosomes), green (mitochondria), blue (nucleus). The expected outputs are 'channel_1.png', 'channel_2.png', and 'channel_1_stats.csv'. Note: While Colour Deconvolution is typically designed for bright-field microscopy (subtractive color), the agent must still apply it to this fluorescence image (additive color) exactly as instructed by the task.
